aboutDescription: Learn more about our fitness application and mission.
classesDescription: Explore our wide range of fitness classes and training sessions.
healthyDescription: Discover health tips and wellness information to improve your lifestyle.

ask-for-gender: We Need To Know Your Gender
kyc-steps-headline: This helps us create Your personalized plan
password-regex: Password must be at least 6 characters long
gender-message: Gender must be either male or female
height-message: Height must be at least 50 cm
weight-message: Weight must be at least 20 kg
why-us-content: We offer a fitness journey that's tailored to your goals, supported by professional trainers and a welcoming community. Whether it's weight loss, strength building, or overall wellness, our proven methods.
feature-one-content: We tailor every workout to fit your unique goals and fitness level ensuring that you make the most progress.
Feature-two-content: Everything we do is designed to help you achieve measurable results, whether you're aiming for weight loss.
Feature-three-content: We provide the latest in gym equipment, from cardio machines to free weights, designed to support every type.
why-us-title: ELEVATE FITNESS WITH THE <highlight>BEST WAY</highlight> POSSIBLE
Health-title: FUEL YOUR FITNESS JOURNEY WITH CUSTOMIZED <highlight>MEAL PLANS</highlight> FOR YOU
